verses.text: Topa-a' ci un, van mite aw; minthan'na leh hatna Topa-a' ci un
Ama minthan'na Topa' tungah pia un la, a siangtho kizepna tawh Topa bia un
Topa' awging tuipite tungah kiza hi. A minthang Pasian' aw ging damdam a, tui tampite tungah Topa' aw kiza hi
Topa' awging vanglian a, Topa' awging, liatna tawh kidim hi
Topa' awging in taamtak singte kitansak a, Topa' awging in Lebanon mual taamtak singte a kuaitan hi
Lebanon mual leh Sirion mualte bawngno leh gamsialno bangin amah in a diangsak hi
Topa' awging in meikuang taangkhia sak hi
Topa' awging in gamlak lok a, Topa in Kadesh gamlak lok hi
Topa' awging in singkungte heekgawp a, gammang tulak hawkkhia-in a kolhsak hi. Ama biakinn sungah a vekpi-un awngin, “Pasian' min thang ta hen,” a ci uh hi
Topa in tui thukpite uk a, a tawntung kumpi hihna tawh Topa a tu hi
Topa in ama mite tungah thahatna pia ta hen. Topa in ama mite tungah nopsakna thupha pia ta hen.
